div1.entryFree:
Balm, vb., 1) to anoint with some thing odoriferous: b. his foul head in warm distilled waters, Shr. Ind. 1, 48. --ed and entreasured with full bags of spices, Per. III, 2, 65.
2) to anoint with any thing medicinal, to heal: this rest might yet have --ed thy broken sinews, Lr. III, 6, 105.
